beat.title: Vola's Story
beat.boundaryReason: The session opens in the north tower with Vola recounting her captivity, Agata Dustmother, and the unfinished ritual before the party shifts from information gathering into operational planning.
dateEvidence: The manifest starts the session on 1748-04-12.
The DM opening says the sun is setting and the group is catching its breath at dusk.

beat.title: Reconnaissance Run
beat.boundaryReason: Kenzo and Wellby make the first covert pass through the keep grounds, discover the ruined chapel, the undead gnoll, and the goat-like demon, then return to report after less than an hour.
dateEvidence: The scout happens after sunset once the courtyard is described as pitch black apart from the keep fires.
The party completes a short rest while the pair scout and return later the same night.

beat.boundaryReason: Back in the tower, the party analyzes the scout report, debates whether the ritual can wait, and finally crosses the courtyard to spring an ambush on the keep.
dateEvidence: The scene begins immediately after the night scout returns.
The approach to the keep is described as happening in full darkness with the fires as the only illumination.

beat.title: Searching the Ruins
beat.boundaryReason: With the demon down, the party searches the keep, puts out the ritual fires, finds more hobgoblin papers, and decides whether the tower is safe enough for the night.
dateEvidence: The battle has just ended and the group immediately begins searching before sleeping.
It remains full night outside, with darkness deepening as the main fire is banked.

beat.title: Troubled Rest
beat.boundaryReason: The party retreats to the tower, survives a night of bad dreams and incomplete recovery, and wakes at dawn to plan the next day's push against the remaining gnolls and the corrupted grounds.
dateEvidence: The manifest ends the session on 1748-04-13.
The rest resolves overnight and the DM explicitly says the party wakes in the morning.
